items.sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — Critical 25th May Threat Intelligence Report CVE-2026-34926
id: 39bcabb5-8c10-5378-9200-a5efc58a0676
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-34926 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: CRITICAL | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-34926
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/14
modified: 2026/06/14
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: critical
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-34926 Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-14T17:45:31Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CVE-2026-34926", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-34926 Exploitation Attempt - RCE"; flow:established,to_server; content:"/bin/sh"; nocase; content:"cmd.exe"; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:5609182; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-14, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
items.apex_ai_summary: [P1] CVE / Vulnerability - high severity (Risk 7.5/10). EPSS 1.0% exploitation probability (30-day forecast). MITRE ATT&CK mapped: Exfiltration Over C2 Channel, Valid Accounts, Data Encrypted for Impact, Phishing (5 techniques). Actor attribution: CDB-FIN-07. AI confidence: MODERATE (42%) - partial intelligence corroboration.

id: f93034a7-992f-565c-994a-de4dea29fd53
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2024-24919 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: CRITICAL | Class: KEV_EXPLOIT
references:

    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-24919
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/14
modified: 2026/06/14
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: network_connection
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        EventID:
            - 4625
            - 4648
            - 4728
        LogonType: 3
    condition: selection
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative access

level: critical
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2024-24919 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-14T17:45:31Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2024-24919", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
items.suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2024-24919 Exploitation Attempt - KEV_EXPLOIT"; flow:established,to_server; content:"|90 90 90 90|"; rawbytes; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:7648443; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-06-14, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)

id: 988f5f2c-f3b8-59db-afbd-34674087de3b
status: experimental
description: |

detection:
    selection_encrypt:
        TargetFilename|endswith:
            - '.locked'
            - '.encrypted'
            - '.crypted'
            - '.enc'
        EventID: 11
    selection_ransomnote:
        TargetFilename|contains:
            - 'README'
            - 'HOW_TO_DECRYPT'
            - 'RECOVER_FILES'
    selection_vssdelete:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'vssadmin delete shadows'
            - 'wmic shadowcopy delete'
            - 'bcdedit /set'
    condition: selection_encrypt or selection_ransomnote or selection_vssdelete
falsepositives:
    - Encryption software (VeraCrypt, BitLocker) in use
level: critical

            - 'bcdedit /set'
    condition: selection_encrypt or selection_ransomnote or selection_vssdelete

level: critical

// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2024-57727 — Anomalous Activity Detection

let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent

| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2024-57727", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc

title: SENTINEL APEX — Critical 4th May Threat Intelligence Report CVE-2023-1389
id: dab89503-9183-5f63-a9d5-b95c808f42f7
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2023-1389 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: CRITICAL | Class: RCE
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2023-1389
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/06/14
modified: 2026/06/14
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: process_creation
    product: generic
detection:
    selection_process:
        CommandLine|contains:
            - 'cmd.exe /c'
            - 'powershell -enc'
            - '/bin/sh -c'
            - 'wget http'
            - 'curl http'
    selection_webshell:
        Image|endswith:
            - '\cmd.exe'
            - '\powershell.exe'
            - '/bash'
            - '/sh'
        ParentImage|contains:
            - 'w3wp.exe'
            - 'httpd'
            - 'nginx'
            - 'apache2'
            - 'tomcat'
    condition: selection_process or selection_webshell
falsepositives:
    - Legitimate administrative scripts executing via web server
    - Deployment automation tools
level: critical
items.kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2023-1389 Remote Code Execution Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-06-14T17:45:31Z
// Deploy to: Microsoft Sentinel / Defender XDR
let lookback = 1d;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "tomcat.exe", "java.exe")
    and FileName in~ ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "bash", "sh", "python.exe", "python3"))
    or (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("wget http", "curl http", "certutil -urlcache", "bitsadmin /transfer"))
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| where not(ProcessCommandLine has_any ("update", "install", "backup", "deploy"))  // filter known-good
| extend Severity = "HIGH", CVE = "CVE-2023-1389", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by Timestamp desc
